meaningTh: การเข้าซื้อกิจการ
meaningEn: the act of acquiring a company or asset
examples: The acquisition of the rival company was finalized last week.

meaningTh: การตัดจำหน่าย
meaningEn: the gradual writing off of an intangible asset over time
examples: The amortization of the loan is spread over 15 years.

meaningTh: หนี้สิน / ความรับผิดชอบ
meaningEn: a company's financial debts or obligations
examples: The company's total liabilities exceeded its assets.

meaningTh: เงินปันผล
meaningEn: a sum of money paid to shareholders from profits
examples: The board declared a quarterly dividend of $0.50 per share.

meaningTh: หลักประกัน
meaningEn: something pledged as security for repayment of a loan
examples: The bank requires collateral before approving the loan.

meaningTh: การตรวจสอบบัญชี
meaningEn: an official inspection of accounts
examples: The company undergoes an annual financial audit.

meaningTh: บัญชีแยกประเภท
meaningEn: a book for recording financial transactions
examples: All transactions must be recorded in the general ledger.

meaningTh: การจัดซื้อจัดจ้าง
meaningEn: the action of obtaining goods or services
examples: The procurement department handles all vendor contracts.

meaningTh: กำหนด / ระบุไว้
meaningEn: to demand or specify a requirement as part of an agreement
examples: The contract stipulates that payment must be made within 30 days.

meaningTh: แทนที่ / ล้าสมัย
meaningEn: to take the place of something previously used
examples: This new regulation supersedes all previous guidelines.

meaningTh: เร่งรัด
meaningEn: to make an action or process happen sooner or faster
examples: We will expedite the shipment to ensure timely delivery.

meaningTh: ค่าตอบแทน
meaningEn: money paid for work or a service
examples: The remuneration package includes a base salary and performance bonus.

meaningTh: วาระการดำรงตำแหน่ง / ระยะเวลาทำงาน
meaningEn: the period during which someone holds a position
examples: During her tenure as CEO, the company doubled its revenue.

meaningTh: การลาออก / การลดจำนวนพนักงาน
meaningEn: the gradual reduction of staff through resignation
examples: The company reduced its workforce through natural attrition.

meaningTh: การประเมินผล
meaningEn: a formal assessment of an employee's performance
examples: The annual performance appraisal will take place in December.

meaningTh: เงินชดเชยเลิกจ้าง
meaningEn: money paid to an employee upon dismissal or redundancy
examples: Employees who are laid off will receive a severance package.

meaningTh: การเลิกจ้างเพราะตำแหน่งไม่จำเป็น
meaningEn: the state of being no longer needed in a job
examples: The restructuring resulted in 200 redundancies across the company.

meaningTh: ผู้ใต้บังคับบัญชา
meaningEn: a person under the authority of another in an organization
examples: A good manager listens to feedback from subordinates.

meaningTh: มอบหมาย
meaningEn: to entrust a task or responsibility to another person
examples: Effective leaders know when to delegate tasks to their team.

meaningTh: เลื่อนการประชุม / พักการประชุม
meaningEn: to break off a meeting with the intention of resuming later
examples: The chairman decided to adjourn the meeting until Monday.

meaningTh: กำหนดการเดินทาง
meaningEn: a planned route or journey
examples: The travel itinerary includes stops in three cities.

meaningTh: การแวะพักระหว่างเที่ยวบิน
meaningEn: a period of rest or waiting before a further stage in a journey
examples: We have a four-hour layover in Tokyo before the connecting flight.

meaningTh: การส่งกลับประเทศ
meaningEn: the return of someone or something to their own country
examples: The insurance covers emergency repatriation in case of illness.

meaningTh: ขึ้นเรือ / เริ่มต้น
meaningEn: to go on board a ship or aircraft; to begin a journey
examples: Passengers will embark at Gate 7 beginning at 2:30 PM.

meaningTh: ยกระดับ / ส่งต่อให้ผู้มีอำนาจสูงกว่า
meaningEn: to increase in intensity or refer to a higher authority
examples: If the issue is not resolved, we will escalate it to the manager.

meaningTh: ชดเชย
meaningEn: to give something in recognition of loss or suffering
examples: The airline will compensate passengers affected by the cancellation.

meaningTh: ความคลาดเคลื่อน / ความไม่ตรงกัน
meaningEn: a difference between things that should be the same
examples: There is a discrepancy between the invoice and the purchase order.

meaningTh: กลุ่มประชากร
meaningEn: a particular sector of a population
examples: The campaign targets the 18-35 demographic.

meaningTh: การรับรอง / การสนับสนุน
meaningEn: a public declaration of support or approval
examples: The celebrity endorsement boosted the brand's visibility.

meaningTh: หนังสือชี้ชวน
meaningEn: a printed document advertising or describing a product or institution
examples: Investors should review the prospectus before making a decision.

meaningTh: ภาษีศุลกากร / อัตราค่าบริการ
meaningEn: a tax or duty on imports or exports
examples: The government imposed a new tariff on imported electronics.

meaningTh: สินค้าที่ส่งมอบ
meaningEn: a batch of goods delivered or sent
examples: The consignment of raw materials arrived this morning.

meaningTh: การห้ามค้าขาย / คำสั่งห้าม
meaningEn: an official ban on trade or activity
examples: The trade embargo has affected exports to several countries.

meaningTh: พนักงานต้อนรับ (โรงแรม)
meaningEn: a hotel employee who assists guests with arrangements
examples: The concierge can arrange transportation to the airport.

meaningTh: เงินทิป
meaningEn: a sum of money given for good service; a tip
examples: A 15% gratuity is automatically added for groups of six or more.

meaningTh: ชั่วคราว / เบื้องต้น
meaningEn: arranged or existing for the present, possibly to be changed later
examples: The provisional results will be confirmed after the final review.

meaningTh: ให้สัตยาบัน / รับรอง
meaningEn: to formally approve or confirm something
examples: The board must ratify the merger agreement before it takes effect.

meaningTh: บรรเทา / ลดความรุนแรง
meaningEn: to make something less severe or serious
examples: The company implemented measures to mitigate potential risks.

meaningTh: รวม / ทำให้แข็งแกร่ง
meaningEn: to combine several things into a single more effective whole
examples: The company plans to consolidate its three offices into one.

meaningTh: ความเป็นไปได้
meaningEn: the state of being possible or practical
examples: A feasibility study was conducted before launching the project.

meaningTh: ค่าเสื่อมราคา
meaningEn: a reduction in the value of an asset over time
examples: The depreciation of company vehicles is calculated over five years.

meaningTh: เงินที่ส่งไป / การโอนเงิน
meaningEn: a sum of money sent as payment or gift
examples: Please include the remittance advice with your payment.

meaningTh: การชดใช้ค่าเสียหาย / ค่าสินไหมทดแทน
meaningEn: security against loss or legal responsibility for actions
examples: The contract includes an indemnity clause protecting both parties.

meaningTh: การปฏิบัติตามกฎระเบียบ
meaningEn: the act of conforming to rules or standards
examples: The company hired a compliance officer to ensure adherence to regulations.

meaningTh: ข้อกำหนดเบื้องต้น
meaningEn: something that must exist or happen before something else can happen
examples: A master's degree is a prerequisite for this research position.

meaningTh: ที่เป็นกรรมสิทธิ์ / ลิขสิทธิ์เฉพาะ
meaningEn: owned by a particular person or company; exclusive
examples: The company uses proprietary technology that gives it a competitive edge.

meaningTh: การจัดการโลจิสติกส์
meaningEn: the detailed organization of a complex operation
examples: The logistics team coordinated the delivery of 10,000 units across the region.

meaningTh: สอบเทียบ / ปรับตั้ง
meaningEn: to adjust precisely for a particular function
examples: The technician needs to calibrate the equipment before use.

meaningTh: ล้าสมัย / ไม่ใช้แล้ว
meaningEn: no longer produced or used; out of date
examples: The old filing system has become obsolete since we moved to digital records.

meaningTh: สูญเสียสิทธิ์ / ถูกริบ
meaningEn: to lose or give up something as a penalty
examples: Failure to comply with the terms may result in forfeiting the deposit.

meaningTh: การฟ้องร้องคดี
meaningEn: the process of taking legal action
examples: The company settled to avoid costly litigation.

meaningTh: อนุญาโตตุลาการ / การตัดสินข้อพิพาท
meaningEn: the use of an independent person to settle a dispute
examples: The dispute was resolved through binding arbitration.
